title: Latest F1 News
description: Don't miss a Formula 1 moment – with the latest news, videos, standings and results. Go behind the scenes and get analysis straight from the paddock.

items.title: Antonelli storms to pole position for Miami Grand Prix
items.content: Kimi Antonelli secured his third consecutive pole position in style for the Miami Grand Prix.

items.title: Bortoleto disqualified from Miami Sprint over technical breach
items.content: F1’s stewards have disqualified Audi driver Gabriel Bortoleto from the Miami Sprint due to a technical violation that was picked up on his car post-race.

items.title: Antonelli left to rue another slow start in Miami Sprint
items.content: Kimi Antonelli had to settle for sixth position in the Miami Grand Prix Sprint race after losing ground on the opening lap and later being hit with a penalty for a track limits violation.

items.title: Watch the highlights from the Miami Sprint as Norris wins
items.content: McLaren's extensive upgrades paid off in the Miami Sprint as Lando Norris won from team mate Oscar Piastri, with Ferrari's Charles Leclerc taking the final podium spot.

items.title: F2: Tsolov beats Van Hoepen and Dunne in dramatic Miami Sprint
items.content: Nikola Tsolov claimed his second victory of the 2026 FIA Formula 2 season by beating rivals Laurens van Hoepen and Alex Dunne in a drag race to the line at the Miami Sprint Race.
